projects.title: Kaiyō — Japanese Sea Cuisine
projects.description: An ultra-premium, interactive web sanctuary for Kaiyō — a 3-Michelin star elite Japanese Sea Cuisine restaurant, built with React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

projects.title: Todo List App
projects.description: A fully functional todo list application built with vanilla JavaScript. Features include add, delete, mark complete, and local storage persistence.

projects.title: Weather App
projects.description: A real-time weather application that fetches data from a weather API. Displays temperature, humidity, wind speed, and a 5-day forecast with dynamic icons.

projects.title: Multi-Section Personal Website
projects.description: A responsive multi-section personal website built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Showcases a modern layout with a navigation header, hero banner, about section, services, testimonials, newsletter subscription, and footer.

projects.title: Landing Page
projects.description: A responsive landing page built with HTML and CSS. Features smooth scrolling, a hero section, cards grid, and a contact form.

projects.title: ShadePro Website
projects.description: Shade Pro is a modern, responsive business landing page built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It is designed to showcase services, build trust with users, and drive engagement through a clean and visually appealing interface.
